ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Public Health Region */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination type */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered in this category */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people fully vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_phr_id FOREIGN KEY ("phr_id") REFERENCES public_health_regions ("phr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination data record */,
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Public Health Region */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination type */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered in this category */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people fully vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_regions" (
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health region */,
  "phr_name" TEXT /* Name of the health region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the health region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health region it belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_phr_id FOREIGN KEY ("phr_id") REFERENCES public_health_regions ("phr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 16-49 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health region responsible for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_phr_id FOREIGN KEY ("phr_id") REFERENCES public_health_regions ("phr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the center is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "phr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the public health region */,
  "total_doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered in this region */,
  "total_people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total people vaccinated in this region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_phr_id FOREIGN KEY ("phr_id") REFERENCES public_health_regions ("phr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination type (e.g., COVID-19, Flu) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccination type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_vaccination_data, download_vaccination_data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data record being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_comments_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("record_id")
)
